parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ username: [$json.username], resultsLimit: 100, resultsType: 'posts', proxy: { useApifyProxy: true, apifyProxyGroups: ['RESIDENTIAL'] }, loginCookies: [{ name: 'sessionid', value: 'YOUR_INSTAGRAM_SESSION_ID', domain: '.instagram.com' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ platform: 'instagram', username: $json.username, profile_url: 'https://www.instagram.com/' + $json.username + '/', followers: $json.owner_followers, following: $json.owner_following, bio: $json.owner_bio }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ profile_id: $('Prep Finalize').first().json.profile_id, apify_run_id: $('Prep Finalize').first().json.apify_run_id, status: 'completed', posts_scraped: $('Prep Finalize').first().json.posts_count, completed_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, username: $('Extract Run ID').first().json.username, posts_scraped: $('Prep Finalize').first().json.posts_count, apify_run_id: $('Prep Finalize').first().json.apify_run_id }) }}
